title: quercus alba f. pinnatifida
intro: Quercus alba f. pinnatifida, also known as the white oak variety with pinnately divided leaves, is a subspecies of the white oak tree native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of tannins and flavonoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus alba f. pinnatifida include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
